title: [LAB] P1: Implement PostHog activation funnel tracking
description: Implement comprehensive activation tracking using PostHog to measure user onboarding success and identify drop-off points. This is foundational for Week 2 product optimization hypothesis validation. Current gap: No activation tracking exists, making it impossible to measure product quality or optimize onboarding. Target: Achieve 60%+ 24h activation rate by Week 4.
acceptance_criteria: PostHog event tracking implemented for all activation funnel steps: signup_completed, onboarding_started, first_memory_created, first_memory_viewed, feature_discovered
Activation funnel dashboard created in PostHog with conversion rates at each step
Automated daily report configured to send to #product Slack channel
Real-time alert configured for activation rate <50%
Server-side and client-side tracking implemented (privacy-compliant with GDPR consent)
Test coverage for all tracking events (unit + integration tests)
Documentation updated with event schema and tracking implementation guide
CPO verification that dashboard shows accurate data with test users
activity_log: 2026-03-28T05:20:00.000Z [cpo] Task created: Activation tracking implementation for Week 2 product optimization hypothesis

metadata.business_impact: High - enables product quality measurement and optimization
